subcodes.first_line: The Fire of the All-Merciful blazeth forth in truth from the Divine Lote-Tree of Man in the heart of this Paradise, and every being proclaimeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نار الرحمن من سدره الانسان فی قطب هذالرضوان علی الحق موقودا و ینطق کل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
